parse.title: Voltaic Cyclosword
parse.wikitext:
: ''For the removed {{ai|Living Forge|Ornn|Masterwork}} item, see {{ii|Swordnado}}.''
{{Item info
|goldvalue = 
|goldefficiency = 
|similaritems =Edge of Night;Axiom Arc;Hubris;Youmuu's Ghostblade;Umbral Glaive;The Collector;Serpent's Fang;Profane Hydra;Bastionbreaker 
|background = 
|notes = 
{{Energized info}}
* {{sbc|Firmament}} deals {{tip|proc damage}}, and thus will not trigger [[spell effects]].
* {{sbc|Firmament}} is not blocked by {{tip|spell shield}}.
* {{sbc|Firmanent's}} additional lethality is applied before its own damage.
* {{sbc|Firmanent's}} damage is applied before the damage of the triggering attack or ability.
* '''Voltaic Cyclosword''' is an {{tip|Energized}} effect and will stack with other sources of it.
** ''Energized'' effects will apply their on-hit damage to [[structure]]s.

|revisions = 
|patchhistory =
;[[V26.10]]
* Total cost increased to {{g|3000}} from {{g|2900}}.
** Combine cost increased to {{g|963}} from {{g|863}}.

;[[V26.09]]
* Total cost reduced to {{g|2900}} from {{g|3000}}.
** Combine cost reduced to {{g|863}} from {{g|963}}.
* Lethality reduced to 10 from 18.
* {{sbc|Unique Passive - Galvanize:}}
** {{sbc|New Effect:}} Damaging enemy champions with {{tip|abilities}} can trigger {{tip|Energized}} effects.
** {{sbc|Old Effect:}} {{tip|Energized}} stack generation is increased by 75% for distance travelled from {{tip|dash|dashes}}, {{tip|lunge|lunges}} and {{tip|blink|blinks}}, as well as while moving in {{tip|stealth}}.
*** The increase doesn't apply for ''dashes'', ''lunges'', or ''blinks'' while in ''stealth (e.g {{cai|R|Rengar}}, {{cai|Q|Shaco}} and {{cais|R|Vayne}} {{ai|Q|Vayne}}). [https://www.reddit.com/r/Rengarmains/comments/1lmuuos/bug_r_jump_gives_less_energized_stacks_with/] <!--unsure of whether it was specifically these spells or if for example rengar R - flash was also affected.-->
* {{sbc|Unique Passive - Firmament:}} 
** {{sbc|New Effect:}} When fully {{tip|Energized}}, your next basic attack grants you {{as|{{rd|15|12}} lethality}} for 4 seconds and deals {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} equal to {{as|{{rd|9%|7%}} of the target's '''current''' health}}, capped at 200 against non-champions.
** {{sbc|Old Effect:}} When fully {{tip|Energized}}, your next basic attack deals {{as|100 '''bonus''' physical damage}} on-hit and {{tip|slow|slows}} the target by {{rd|99%|20%}} for {{fd|0.75}} seconds.

;[[V14.19]]
* Total cost increased to {{g|3000}} from {{g|2900}}.
** Combine cost increased to {{g|963}} from {{g|863}}.
* Ability haste reduced to 10 from 15.

;[[V14.12]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Galvanize now triggers from movement during stealth.

;[[V14.11]]
* Can no longer be upgraded to {{ii|Swordnado}}.

;[[V14.10]]
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|The Brutalizer}} + {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{g|863}} = {{g|2900}}.
** {{sbc|Old Recipe:}} {{ii|The Brutalizer}} + {{ii|Kircheis Shard}} + {{g|863}} = {{g|2900}}.

;[[V14.9#May 6th Hotfix|V14.9]] - May 6th Hotfix
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Item grants innate lethality once again.

;[[V14.2]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Now uses the correct buff type for the slow in order for it to be properly resisted by crowd control immunity and slow immunity.
 
;[[V14.1]] - Added
* {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|The Brutalizer}} + {{ii|Kircheis Shard}} + {{g|863}} = {{g|2900}}.
* {{sbc|Stats:}} 55 attack damage, 15 ability haste, 18 lethality.
* {{sbc|Unique Passive - Galvanize:}} Moving and basic attacking generates ''Energize'' stacks, up to 100. {{tip|Dash|Dashing}} or moving while in {{tip|stealth}} generates stacks 75% faster.
* {{sbc|Unique Passive - Firmament:}} When fully {{tip|Energized}}, your next basic attack deals {{as|100 '''bonus''' physical damage}} on-hit and {{tip|slow|slows}} the target by {{rd|99%|20%}} for {{fd|0.75}} seconds.
* Limited to 1 '''Voltaic Cyclosword'''.
* {{cai|Living Forge|Ornn|Masterwork}} item: {{ii|Swordnado}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 70 attack damage, 20 ability haste, 27 lethality.
}}
